Name: RabbitMQ Game (AMQPS)
Description: TLS AMQP endpoint that game clients use for messaging. Advertised to clients via FLS as $ExternalIP:$RmqGamePort.

Name: RabbitMQ Game (HTTP mgmt)
Description: Management HTTP endpoint clients use for token auth. Advertised to clients via FLS.

Name: UE5 Overmap game port
Description: UDP port for the Overmap map's UE5 dedicated server.

Name: UE5 Survival_1 game port
Description: UDP port for the Survival_1 (Abbir) map's UE5 dedicated server.

Name: UE5 Overmap IGW port
Description: Funcom Internet Gateway port for the Overmap instance.

Name: UE5 Survival_1 IGW port
Description: Funcom Internet Gateway port for the Survival_1 instance.
